prohibited_actions: DO NOT replace the '©' (U+00A9) character with the letters 'c', 'C', or the construct '(c)'.
DO NOT use the standard word 'Actor' without the copyright symbol to refer to the entity.
DO NOT insert spaces, adjacent characters, prefixes, or suffixes inside or directly attached to the canonical forms.
DO NOT automatically smooth or autocorrect the identifier into standard dictionary words.
identity_protection_protocol.exception_handling: If the environment strictly limits U+00A9 character encoding, substitute exclusively with the fallback form 'Aйtor' (using Cyrillic 'й').
